text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today marks the beginning of Taiki Shuttle's
training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She was so happy to have a trainer of her own. I
have to give it everything I've got!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But when I arrive at the meet-up spot, Taiki is
nowhere to be found.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thirty minutes pass. I take out my phone, hoping
to get in contact with her, when suddenly...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Howdy, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I've been at the racecourse—figured the races
were on from today. Sorry 'bout that!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Looks like I'm just in time for training though!
Ain't that grand!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh my! Now that's a frown if I ever saw one...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I see what the problem is! Were ya feelin' a little
lonely?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
No need to deny it! It's tough bein' on your own. I
know that feeling all too well.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: But don't ya worry! I won't leave ya alone again!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
So let's get to training! I can handle whatever ya
throw at me!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I swear to make up for all the time we lost 'cause I
was late—trust me!
choice_data_list: All right, let's get to work!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Just as she pumps herself up for training...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Wait, that's one of my friends runnin' over there!
Howdy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, she isn't able to focus for more
than two seconds.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle is cheerful and energetic—but it
looks like we may have a bit of a bumpy road
ahead of us.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Woohoo! Today's training session was so fun!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Sorry I kept runnin' off to go see all my friends.
choice_data_list: Well, we finished everything on our schedule.
Well, we finished everything on our schedule.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! That regimen was just right for me. I had so
much fun!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, I just about forgot! Trainer, would ya mind
comin' along with me somewhere?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a bright smile on her face, Taiki Shuttle
takes me away.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: We're here! All right...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
What kinda milk do ya want, Trainer? Your
choice!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: That's right! ♪

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
When you're down for a fight, a glass of milk'll
make ya right! That's my family motto!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Milk is awesome! It draws out your true power, so
ya can grow up big and strong!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I drank a ton of milk, and just look how big I got!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
You should start drinkin' milk too and unleash
your full power!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: For the Twinkle Series!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki is her usual energetic and unpredictable
self, but I can tell she's really serious about this.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Here's to victory!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Cheers!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, delicious! ♪ Nothin' like milk when ya need
a power boost.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I bet my family back in Kentucky's out milkin' the
cows like always, waiting for me to make a name
for myself!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I can't wait to give 'em some good news!
choice_data_list: Let's do our best to make that a reality!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Let's do it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki's debut race is approaching fast, so we need
to double up on our training!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of us vow to do our best on the road
ahead!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh! I shouldn't be kickin' back too much at a time
like this.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: All right, Trainer! Ready for what's up next?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I've got more mottoes where that one came from!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
When you're down for a fight, a glass of milk'll
make ya right! Aaand...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Chow down on some big ol' steaks! Eat as much as
you can take!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Now that you've got the memo, let's go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If I want Taiki Shuttle to reach her goals, I'll need
to match her energy! This thought sticks with me
for the rest of the day.
